subject: Add finalName declaration to EPSDK-App pom
commit_message:
Add finalName declaration to EPSDK-App pom

The docker build script does not use a version number suffix.

Issue: PORTAL-23
Change-Id: I550b1e344894fa27c2712abe91d9fe7e21397abe
Signed-off-by: Christopher Lott (cl778h) <clott@research.att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/portal-sdk-master-ecomp-sdk-verify-java/18/ : FAILURE

Build failed to find artifact org.openecomp.ecompsdkos:epsdk-core:jar:1.1.0-SNAPSHOT needed for sub-project org.openecomp.ecompsdkos:epsdk-app-common:jar:1.1.0: The following artifacts could not be resolved: org.openecomp.ecompsdkos:epsdk-core:jar:1.1.0-SNAPSHOT, org.openecomp.ecompsdkos:epsdk-analytics:jar:1.1.0-SNAPSHOT, org.openecomp.ecompsdkos:epsdk-workflow:jar:1.1.0-SNAPSHOT. Check correct groupId, artifactId and version. This may also indicate a problem with nexus. Another possibility is that this is a -SNAPSHOT version and it has expired from nexus -- in that case check with the project which provides the artifact.
